Plaintiff North Beach Condominium Associations Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Striking The Answer To Unverified Complaint And Entering The Default Of Defendant Gregory Brubaker
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Paul W. Windust, esq. (925-838-2090) of Berding & Weil LLP for Plaintiff NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Striking The Answer To Unverified Complaint And Entering The Default Of Defendant Gregory Brubaker

Granted, subject to a written order.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeff Wohl, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions [Ccp Sections 2030.290 Et Seq.]
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Paul W. Windust of the law offices of Berding & Weil LLP (714-429-0600) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Russell A. Ribinson of the law offices of Russell A. Ribinson (415-861-4416) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. Proceedings are not reported.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF, NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions [Ccp Sections 2030.290 Et Seq.] is GRANTED as follows:

1. Defendant will serve within ten (10) days code compliant responses to requests for admission Nos. 3 - 12. Defendant's objections are overruled.

2. Defendant will serve within twenty-one (21) days full and complete responses, without objection, to special interrogatories Nos. 1 - 18. Defendant's objections are overruled.

3. Defendant will serve within twenty-one (21) days full and complete responses without objection, to form interrogatories Nos. 2.8, 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 12.5, 12.6, 14.1, 14.2, 15.5, 50.1, 50.2, 50.3,50.4, 50,5, and 50.6.

4. Defendant will produce within twenty-one (21) days from the date of this order without objections save for a claim of attorney-client privilege all documents responsive to Plaintiff's request for production of documents Nos. 1 - 9. To the extent that Plaintiff is withholding any documents on the grounds of attorney-client privilege, he will identify such documents with sufficient specificity to enable Plaintiff to challenge that claim.

5. Defendant is ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $3,1877.50 to Plaintiff within ten (10) days from the date of this order.

Written order is signed and filed.

Judge: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
